05-build-fix.caveat: MuleSoft exp-api pseudo-code — full Anypoint Studio project build requires CloudHub credentials and Anypoint Platform access

06-e2e.caveat: E2E tests NOT RUN — blocked by NGASIM-3058 (SF trigger), NGASIM-3335 (prc-api), NGASIM-3143 (sys-api), and MC sandbox provisioning

07-security.caveat: 2 CRITICAL security findings: PII exposure in MuleSoft logs/DLQ, MC API credentials not in secure vault; 3 HIGH: consent state machine, replay ID gap, mTLS not configured

caveats: NGASIM-3058 (SF Apex trigger for consent platform event) is in QA — blocks live integration testing
Sibling MuleSoft stories (NGASIM-3335 prc-api, NGASIM-3143 sys-api) are both To Do — full API-led chain untestable
Marketing Cloud sandbox access not yet provisioned for integration testing

2 CRITICAL security findings: PII (phone numbers) logged in clear text in MuleSoft flows and DLQ messages; MC API OAuth2 credentials stored as application properties instead of Anypoint Secure Properties or Vault

3 HIGH security findings: Consent state machine validation missing (out-of-order events possible), platform event replay ID tracking not implemented (event gap detection), mTLS not configured between MuleSoft and MC API
No story covers MC → SF confirmation callback for double opt-in completion — critical scope gap for Product Owner
MuleSoft exp-api is pseudo-code — full Anypoint Studio project build requires CloudHub deployment
MC Classic REST API chosen over MC Connect (et4ae5) — documented in ADR-004 but requires validation with MC admin team

signals: MC Classic REST API for SMS
Consent data may flow to Data Cloud in future — flagged as re-architecture trigger
ContactPointTypeConsent is Health Cloud standard object
